desc: Claude Skills for Governance, Risk, & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, EU AI A…
descFull: Claude Skills for Governance, Risk, & Compliance (GRC): Expert-level compliance guidance for ISO 27001, SOC 2, FedRAMP, GDPR, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS, EU AI Act, ISO 42001, ISO 27701, DORA, CSRD, India's DPDPA, CMMC 2.0, NIST AI Risk, SWIFT, Australia's ISM, EU NIS2, CCPA/CPRA, and others. Benchmark 97% (with skills) vs 81% (without skills).
